column33: I chose ghost rider to ko henchmen and Elektra to work with Spiderman.  My plan did not work how I thought. Very few henchmen showed up. Thanks to Dr octopus I got Emma frosts rare on turn 3.

I managed to get Jean’s and Bishop’s rates in the right hand and drew every card two turns in a row. The final turn I made 54 attack and cleared the city, then hit kingpin 3 times. The tactic could have caused a flood of Maggie goons to overrun the city for a loss, but it turned out i had other villains in the VD every other spot to avoid that flood of ambush as long as possible. A nice end to the tournament getting a classic combo to land.

column33: Great set up! And thanks for the promo!

OCW with Kingpin is never "fun" but I appreciate the challenge! 
My wife didn't fancy this one, so I solo'd it. The first attempt I went for Bystander shenanigans but it was too slow and I was Goon'd out early. The second I went draw crazy - one side going full Iceman, the other going a bit of everything to beat and KO Goons with Ghost Rider. 
The second go worked, but not without 4 Goons escaping on Twists. If I'd not had 3 twists before the first Goon, I suspect I'd have lost.
Thanks for the second chance!

First attempt I got stuck with two nasty locations right out of the gate. Really slowed me down, especially once the Wounds started rolling in. Second attempt I swapped Joe Fixit for X-Force Wolverine. Player 1 got Reckless Abandon, Warflight and a bunch of cheap draw cards with dual icons and they ran away with it. P2 got Caiera’s rare but kept discarding it with Hawk Dive, and only got to use it for the final blow.

M.O.D.O.K was tough but I realized I had iceman left! Darkhawk and Domino work so well together its fantastic, managed to get the rare darkhawk with all of the recruit i was getting from the flexibility.  Great heroes!
I don’t like modok at all.

column33: Fun game. Glad we got modok quick as I think the plutonium could get out of hand as the villain deck runs out.

Maybe a 2.5 setup. Not a big fan of the scheme it was just hard to keep track of how many cards were each pile. Goblin underworld a lot tougher than I remember and the added annihilation wave and henchmen was brutal with advancing the villains plus stacking up the meat shields. I tried it twice to see if I had a bad card draw, but it was a goose egg on both trys.
